temporal_description: A low-angle, static shot captures the silhouettes of two large, gothic-style stone buildings against a dark, stormy sky. The audio is filled with a deep, ominous, and resonant rumbling sound, like a distant, powerful storm or a low-frequency hum that creates a palpable sense of dread and suspense. The sky is filled with a chaotic, glowing turquoise energy, resembling a massive electrical storm or an otherworldly phenomenon. The Chinese characters "风行网" are visible in the top right corner of the screen. The camera cuts to a close-up of a young woman with long, reddish-brown hair and wide, fearful blue eyes. She peers through a dark, ornate stone archway, her expression one of shock and apprehension. The same glowing turquoise energy from the previous shot illuminates the scene around her. The "风行网" text remains in the top right corner. The shot changes to a medium shot of a man and the same woman in a dimly lit, stone-walled room. The man, in the foreground, is seen in profile, looking off-screen with a concerned expression. The woman stands slightly behind him, also looking in the same direction. In the background, another person is visible standing in a stone archway, silhouetted against the dark environment. The "风行网" text is still present in the top right corner. The sound is continuous and heavy, building a tense and foreboding atmosphere, as if something immense and unsettling is unfolding. There is no dialogue or other distinct sound effects, allowing the unsettling ambient noise to dominate the soundscape.
